languages.text: "...занятно, что эта особь была сочтена достаточно ценной, чтобы заточить ее в подобную конструкцию. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Сестра Мессима{/g}, как ее называли, совершала некий искупительный поход в регионе, который закончился для нее в моей коллекции..."

traits.locale_text: "Сестра Мессима, заточенная в конструкцию типа "умертвитель" и совершавшая искупительный поход в регионе. Понадобилась изрядная изворотливость, чтобы провести экстракцию — экспонат практически начали причислять к сомну святых".

languages.text: "...curious that this specimen was deemed precious enough to be encased in such a construct. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sister Messima{/g}, as she was called, was completing some march of penance in the region, which ended with her entering my collection..."
languages.original_text: "...занятно, что эта особь была сочтена достаточно ценной, чтобы заточить ее в подобную конструкцию. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Сестра Мессима{/g}, как ее называли, совершала некий искупительный поход в регионе, который закончился для нее в моей коллекции..."

traits.locale_text: "...curious that this specimen was deemed precious enough to be encased in such a construct. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sister Messima{/g}, as she was called, was completing some march of penance in the region, which ended with her entering my collection..."

"...curious that this specimen was deemed precious enough to be encased in such a construct. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sister Messima{/g}, as she was called, was completing some march of penance in the region, which ended with her entering my collection..."

"Sister Messima, who was imprisoned in a Mortifier-type construction and was completing a march of penance in the region. It took a great deal of finesse to carry out the extraction — the exhibit was on the verge of being counted among the host of saints."

"...curious that this specimen was deemed precious enough to be encased in such a construct. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sister Messima{/g}, as she was called, was completing some march of penance in the region, which ended with her entering my collection..."

"...curious that this specimen was deemed precious enough to be encased in such a construct. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sister Messima{/g}, as she was called, was completing some march of penance in the region, which ended with her entering my collection..."

languages.text: “……奇怪，这个样本居然在当初被视为珍宝，配得上用这种构造装置来封存。她叫{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}梅西玛修女{/g}，当时正在这片区域执行忏悔远征，结果却以被纳入我的收藏而告终……”
languages.original_text: "...curious that this specimen was deemed precious enough to be encased in such a construct. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sister Messima{/g}, as she was called, was completing some march of penance in the region, which ended with her entering my collection..."

traits.locale_text: “……奇怪，这个样本居然在当初被视为珍宝，配得上用这种构造装置来封存。她叫{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}梅西玛修女{/g}，当时正在这片区域执行忏悔远征，结果却以被纳入我的收藏而告终……”

languages.text: «... curioso que este espécimen fuese tan valioso como para encerrarlo en semejante construcción. La {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}hermana Messima{/g}, como la llamaban, estaba terminando una marcha de penitencia por la región que acabó llevándola a ingresar en mi colección...».
languages.original_text: "...curious that this specimen was deemed precious enough to be encased in such a construct. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sister Messima{/g}, as she was called, was completing some march of penance in the region, which ended with her entering my collection..."

traits.locale_text: «... curioso que este espécimen fuese tan valioso como para encerrarlo en semejante construcción. La {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}hermana Messima{/g}, como la llamaban, estaba terminando una marcha de penitencia por la región que acabó llevándola a ingresar en mi colección...».

languages.text: « ... curieux que ce spécimen ait été jugé assez précieux pour se retrouver enchâssé dans un tel dispositif. Elle se nommait {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sœur Messima{/g}. Elle accomplissait un pèlerinage de pénitence dans la région, qui s'est terminé par son entrée dans ma collection... »
languages.original_text: "...curious that this specimen was deemed precious enough to be encased in such a construct. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sister Messima{/g}, as she was called, was completing some march of penance in the region, which ended with her entering my collection..."

traits.locale_text: « ... curieux que ce spécimen ait été jugé assez précieux pour se retrouver enchâssé dans un tel dispositif. Elle se nommait {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sœur Messima{/g}. Elle accomplissait un pèlerinage de pénitence dans la région, qui s'est terminé par son entrée dans ma collection... »

languages.text: "Bu numunenin böyle bir yapının içine kapatılacak kadar değerli görülmesi ilginç. Kendisine dendiği şekliyle {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Rahibe Messima{/g}, bölgede kefaret yürüyüşünü tamamlıyordu. Bu yürüyüş, koleksiyonuma katılmasıyla son buldu..."
languages.original_text: "...curious that this specimen was deemed precious enough to be encased in such a construct. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sister Messima{/g}, as she was called, was completing some march of penance in the region, which ended with her entering my collection..."

traits.locale_text: "Bu numunenin böyle bir yapının içine kapatılacak kadar değerli görülmesi ilginç. Kendisine dendiği şekliyle {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Rahibe Messima{/g}, bölgede kefaret yürüyüşünü tamamlıyordu. Bu yürüyüş, koleksiyonuma katılmasıyla son buldu..."

languages.text: "... seltsam, dass dieses Versuchsstück für ein derartiges Konstrukt als wertvoll genug befunden wurde. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Schwester Messima{/g}, wie sie genannt wurde, hat in der Region eine Wallfahrt unternommen, die ihr einen Platz in meiner Sammlung bescherte ..."
languages.original_text: "...curious that this specimen was deemed precious enough to be encased in such a construct. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sister Messima{/g}, as she was called, was completing some march of penance in the region, which ended with her entering my collection..."

traits.locale_text: "... seltsam, dass dieses Versuchsstück für ein derartiges Konstrukt als wertvoll genug befunden wurde. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Schwester Messima{/g}, wie sie genannt wurde, hat in der Region eine Wallfahrt unternommen, die ihr einen Platz in meiner Sammlung bescherte ..."

languages.text: "...この標本が、このような構造物に収められるほど貴重なものであると判断されたことに、私は興味を感じました。{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}メシマ・シスター{/g}と名付けられた彼女は、この地域で贖罪の行進をしており、その終わりに、彼女は私のコレクションに加わりました..."
languages.original_text: "...curious that this specimen was deemed precious enough to be encased in such a construct. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sister Messima{/g}, as she was called, was completing some march of penance in the region, which ended with her entering my collection..."

traits.locale_text: "...この標本が、このような構造物に収められるほど貴重なものであると判断されたことに、私は興味を感じました。{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}メシマ・シスター{/g}と名付けられた彼女は、この地域で贖罪の行進をしており、その終わりに、彼女は私のコレクションに加わりました..."
